mapper.sql: select l.log_id, l.work_order_id, l.device_id, d.device_name, l.executor_id, l.executor_name, l.task_type, w.title, l.content, l.result_desc, l.start_time, l.finish_time, l.create_time from garden_device_log l left join garden_device d on d.device_id = l.device_id left join garden_work_order w on w.work_order_id = l.work_order_id
mapper.select:
and d.device_name like concat('%', #{deviceName}, '%')
and l.executor_name like concat('%', #{executorName}, '%')
order by l.create_time desc
